title: Cosplay's NB
body:
It's just a mod that adds more additional armor for cosplaying some of the popular and no so popular characters of vidiogames, anime and series. This mod works with DBC mod.

Features:

-510 set of cosplays like Springtrap from FNAF, Johm 117 (Master Chief of Halo), Chun li from Street fighter's, DoomGuy from Doom (dah) and more and more and a big etc... 

The features do not affect the player experience, they are dragon ball themed armor to be used together with the Dragon Block c mod.
